system.description:
◇ *magical*, *dangerous*

The lid is held fast by no apparent means. It takes some effort to pry open and eagerly snaps back into place.

When **_the urn is open and empty_**, it draws raw elemental force into it like a lodestone draws iron. With the lid in place, the force is safely stored. If the urn is damaged or dented (not hard), any stored force escapes, violently.

*An artifact of the wider world — see @UUID[Compendium.stonetop.wider-world-and-other-wonders.JournalEntry.3UhyCbr1XGkhX6SO]{Tempest Lords}.*
